askQuery: I want to move from consulting into product design

matches.name: Iris Chen
matches.title: Senior Product Designer
matches.rationale: Iris led the Config event team at Figma and writes about moving from IC into program work — directly relevant to your question.

matches.name: James Lee
matches.title: Group PM
matches.rationale: James moved from BCG to product at Coupang in 2019 and has written about that transition.

matches.name: Aanya Sharma
matches.title: Product Designer

profile.name: Iris Chen
profile.headline: Designer interested in how teams move from individual craft to durable systems.
profile.bio: I joined Figma in 2020 after three years at a small product studio. These days I lead the Config event-product crew. Happy to chat with current students or recent grads about portfolios, the first product job, or the IC-to-lead jump.
